sourcesContent:
// ============================================================
// Wedding Details — edit this file to customise the invitation
// ============================================================

export const WEDDING = {
  groomName: "Dinusha",
  brideName: "Chamini",
  groomFullName: "Dinusha Madusanka",
  brideFullName: "Chamini",
  groomBio:
    "A passionate tech enthusiast and developer who loves exploring new technologies, solving complex puzzles, and creating memorable experiences.",
  brideBio:
    "A creative spirit who brings warmth and light to everyone around her. She loves design, nature, and creating beautiful moments.",
  date: new Date("2030-08-11T10:00:00"),
  ceremonyTime: "10:00 AM",
  ceremonyEndTime: "12:00 PM",
  receptionTime: "12:30 PM",
  receptionEndTime: "4:00 PM",
  venue: "Senuri Grand Hotel",
  address: "Senuri Grand Hotel, Sri Lanka",
  mapsUrl:
    "https://maps.google.com/?q=Senuri+Grand+Hotel",
  dressCode: "Formal / Semi-formal / Casual",
  story: [
    {
      title: "First We Met",
      date: "December 25, 2022",
      body:
        "It was a Christmas Eve party neither of us planned to attend. A mutual friend insisted we come — and across a crowded room, our eyes met over a plate of hors d'oeuvres. The rest, as they say, is history.",
    },
    {
      title: "Our First Date",
      date: "January 8, 2023",
      body:
        "He took her to a rooftop jazz bar she had always wanted to visit. They talked until closing time and walked home through the glittering winter streets, neither wanting the night to end.",
    },
    {
      title: "The Proposal",
      date: "June 21, 2025",
      body:
        "On a balmy summer evening with the sunset painted in shades of amber and rose, he got down on one knee on the very rooftop where it all began. She said yes before he finished the question.",
    },
  ],
  gallery: [
    { src: "../images/gallery-1.jpg", caption: "Our favourite café" },
    { src: "../images/gallery-2.jpg", caption: "First anniversary trip" },
    { src: "../images/gallery-3.jpg", caption: "The proposal evening" },
    { src: "../images/gallery-4.jpg", caption: "Engagement shoot" },
    { src: "../images/gallery-5.jpg", caption: "Summer road trip" },
    { src: "../images/gallery-6.jpg", caption: "City adventures" },
  ],
  wishes: [
    {
      name: "Maria & Carlos",
      photo: "../images/couple-1.jpg",
      text:
        '"Wishing you a lifetime of laughter, love, and endless adventures together. You two are absolutely perfect for each other!"',
    },
    {
      name: "Sophie Lambert",
      photo: "../images/couple-2.jpg",
      text:
        '"I have watched your love story unfold from the very beginning. Seeing you both so happy is the greatest gift. Congratulations!"',
    },
    {
      name: "David & Priya Chen",
      photo: "../images/couple-3.jpg",
      text:
        '"May your home be filled with warmth, your hearts with gratitude, and your days with joy. So thrilled to celebrate with you!"',
    },
  ],
};
